title: The Biomed Conference Session in Las Vegas
fullTitle: October 6, 2022 — The Biomed Conference Session in Las Vegas
source: Session transcript (reconstructed from photographed pages of the transcription documents; see the transcription note)
contentNote: Transcription note: this transcript was reconstructed from photographed pages of the community's typed transcription documents; no recording has been located. The two photographed pages are chained by overlapping text. The session includes a dated first-contact prediction (April 16, 2024) — preserved as spoken, not endorsed.
